description: CompositionBlue hooded sweatshirt made of 100% polyester, has embroidery and appliqué work on the left chest, full zippered placket, two pockets on the front, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroideryEvery style maven's wardrobe must have an off-duty essential like this quiksilver sweatshirt that epitomises the comfy yet stylish mood of the moment. Pair this sweatshirt with distressed jeans and sneakers to complete your functional-yet-fashionable look this winter.Model statisticsProduct is a size S on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
